import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let len = string.len(input)
  mut newlines = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < len
    let b = string.byte_at(input, i)
    match b
    when Some(10)
      newlines = newlines + 1
    when _
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut lines = newlines
  if len > 0
    let last = string.byte_at(input, len - 1)
    match last
    when Some(10)
      ()
    when _
      lines = lines + 1
    end
  end
  print("lines=#{lines}")
end
